problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
